name: Alabama Chocolate-Pecan Jumbo Christmas Fudge Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the chocolate wafer crumbs and 1/3 cup melted butter. Firmly press into the bottom and sides of a 9-inch tart pan or pie plate.
2. Bake at 350°F for 6 to 8 minutes.
3. Cream the remaining 1/2 cup softened butter until smooth.
4. Gradually add the brown sugar with the electric mixer on medium speed until blended.
5. Add the eggs one at a time, beating after each addition.
6. Stir in the melted chocolate, instant coffee granules, vanilla extract, flour, and chopped pecans. Pour into the prepared crust.
7. Bake at 375°F for 25 minutes. Turn off the heat and remove from the oven. Allow to cool completely on a rack.
8. Before serving, pipe sweetened whipped cream onto each piece and drizzle with chocolate syrup. Garnish with cherries and/or mint if desired.
